visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing thick black glasses and a dark flat cap stands centrally in a professional studio environment, speaking animatedly. Large graphical overlays for 'Uber Eats' and 'Costco' appear in the foreground, partially obscuring his black T-shirt which features colorful lettering. (2) The visual transitions to a digital screen capture showing the official Costco website interface with a specific section labeled 'Uber Delivery'. The man continues to speak, his image either slightly transparent or cutting back and forth between the website data and his presentation. (3) Returning to a full shot of the presenter, multiple floating icons representing daily necessities like toothbrushes, detergent, and food platters begin to orbit or pop up around him. He uses active hand gestures to emphasize the variety of products available through the new delivery service. (4) A final graphical sequence shows a stylized cash register and price comparison tags as the man explains the cost differences for members. He maintains direct eye contact with the camera, concluding with a firm pointing gesture toward the audience.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: Uber Eats 也可以買到 Costco 產品!?. [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 不用好市多會員也是 OK. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (3) [Variety]: 欸!. [Subtitle]: 有民眾發現好市多官網. (4) [Subtitle]: 一度出現了 Uber Delivery 的頁面. (5) [Subtitle]: 對此台灣好市多回應說確實. (6) [Subtitle]: 依照美國總部規劃. (7) [Subtitle]: 將在 2025 下半年跟 Uber Eats 合作. (8) [Subtitle]: 所以未來呢如果你沒有好市多會員. (9) [Subtitle]: 也可以透過 Uber Eats 來購買. (10) [Subtitle]: 日用品、零食、甚至是生鮮宅配到你家. (11) [Subtitle]: 據了解會員、非會員透過 Uber Eats 去訂購. (12) [Subtitle]: 價格可能會有所不同. (13) [Subtitle]: 更多的細節還有認證方式. (14) [Subtitle]: 到時候正式啟用了才會公布. (15) [Subtitle]: 我們會幫大家持續鎖定的.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man wearing a black T-shirt with 'Apple' text in vibrant colors, a black flat cap, and thick black-rimmed glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a professional studio with grey curtains and soft warm backlighting. The video frequently overlays digital screen captures of the Costco website and various product icons.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male narrator begins speaking in Mandarin with professional articulation. He is accompanied by a continuous, upbeat electronic pop background track. The music has a steady 4/4 beat and bright synth textures, providing a positive and energetic backdrop for the news commentary. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition SFX marks the visual shift to the website screenshot. The narrator maintains a fast but clear speech rate, explaining the significance of the leaked delivery page. The BGM remains constant in the background without any volume dips. (3) As various icons appear on the screen, several crisp 'pop' and 'bubble' sound effects are interspersed with the dialogue. These SFX are synchronized with the visual animations, enhancing the informative yet lighthearted production style of the audio track. (4) The speaker transitions to discussing pricing models, utilizing a slightly more serious yet still friendly tone. The audio ends with a concluding statement and the BGM fading out quickly after the final word. The overall mix is studio-clean with excellent tonal clarity.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> News Evidence -> Operational Details -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform the audience about the upcoming collaboration between Uber Eats and Costco in Taiwan, highlighting that customers can buy Costco goods without a membership while noting potential price differences.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is structured as a news report and commentary by a known tech influencer, not a direct advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical high-quality social-media news snippet utilizing pop-up graphics and clear subtitles to explain a corporate partnership.
